output.description: Optional output override for reason-step approve-with-edit.
output.title: Output

output.description: Optional output override when approving a reason step.
output.title: Output

HumanRetryRequest.description: Optional body for manual HITL retry.

guidance.description: Operator note for this retry run, passed to the worker as _hitl_retry.guidance (overrides the step manifest hitl_retry_guidance for this attempt).
guidance.title: Guidance

retry_token.description: Optional idempotency token for this HTTP request; omit to generate a new token on each call.
retry_token.title: Retry Token

HumanRetryRequest.title: HumanRetryRequest

allow_destructive.description: Required with force on commit steps (duplicate side-effect risk).
allow_destructive.title: Allow Destructive

force.description: Release a non-stale worker claim (reason steps; commit requires allow_destructive).
force.title: Force

reason.description: Optional operator note for audit hooks.
reason.title: Reason

recovery_token.description: Optional client-supplied token (8–128 chars). When provided, duplicate recovery requests with the same token and parameters return the original 202 response without re-enqueueing work.
recovery_token.title: Recovery Token

PendingReviewStepItem.description: One HITL-held step awaiting human approval/rejection.
PendingReviewStepItem.title: PendingReviewStepItem

SagaStepInstanceDetail.description: One saga step instance with execution payloads (GET .../steps/{step_span_id}).

error_details.description: Structured failure metadata (code, message, tool) when the step errors.
error_details.title: Error Details

output_payload.description: Worker output on complete/fail; business data often under output.data.
output_payload.title: Output Payload

prompt_ref.description: Prompt template filename for reason steps.
prompt_ref.title: Prompt Ref

resolved_arguments.description: Evaluated step inputs after JSONPath resolution.
resolved_arguments.title: Resolved Arguments

usage.description: Worker LLM token usage (provider-reported); sibling of timing.
usage.title: Usage

SagaStepInstanceDetail.title: SagaStepInstanceDetail

error_details.description: Structured failure metadata (code, message, tool) when the step errors.
error_details.title: Error Details

usage.description: Worker LLM token usage (provider-reported); sibling of timing.
usage.title: Usage

idempotency_key.description: Client idempotency key; when set, returns existing saga trace_id if one was already started with this key in this namespace.
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

info.description: Control-plane HTTP API for deploying manifests, starting sagas, HITL review, and operator recovery. OSS surface under /v1.
info.title: API Reference

get.description: List registered saga definitions, newest updates first.

parameters.description: Filter by namespace; omit for all.
parameters.name: namespace

schema.description: Filter by namespace; omit for all.
schema.title: Namespace

get.description: Return one saga definition by primary key UUID (for start-saga resolution).
List registered worker definitions, newest updates first.

parameters.description: Filter by namespace; omit for all.
parameters.name: namespace

schema.description: Filter by namespace; omit for all.
schema.title: Namespace

get.description: Return 200 when the API process is serving (after lifespan when using full app).

post.description:
Register a worker or saga manifest. Accepts YAML or JSON body.

Body must define a mapping with `kind` (worker | saga) and kind-specific
fields. Same schema as the file-based manifests used by the CLI.

Returns:
    ManifestDeployResponse with a success message.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 400 on invalid body, unknown kind, or (saga) missing workers.

400.description: Manifest validation failed (invalid YAML/JSON, unknown kind, missing worker references, schema errors).

get.description: List saga instances, newest started_at first.

parameters.description: Filter by namespace; omit for all.
parameters.name: namespace

schema.description: Filter by namespace; omit for all.
schema.title: Namespace

parameters.description: Filter to a single saga instance trace_id.
parameters.name: trace_id

schema.description: Filter to a single saga instance trace_id.
schema.title: Trace Id

parameters.description: Repeat for multiple values, e.g. status=RUNNING&status=PENDING.
parameters.name: status

schema.description: Repeat for multiple values, e.g. status=RUNNING&status=PENDING.
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: When true, filter to non-terminal in-flight statuses (mutually exclusive with status).
parameters.name: in_flight

schema.description: When true, filter to non-terminal in-flight statuses (mutually exclusive with status).
schema.title: In Flight

get.description: List HITL-held steps awaiting human approval/rejection.

parameters.description: Optional step kind: reason or commit.
parameters.name: kind

schema.description: Optional step kind: reason or commit.
schema.title: Kind

post.description:
Start a saga from a registered definition; returns 202 with trace_id.

Creates saga and step instances in a transaction and emits SAGA_STARTED.

Args:
    body: Namespace, name, version, and input for the saga.

Returns:
    StartSagaResponse with trace_id.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if definition not found; 400 on other ValueError.

get.description: List step instances for one saga, ordered by order_index.

parameters.description: Optional namespace guard; must match the saga row.
parameters.name: namespace

schema.description: Optional namespace guard; must match the saga row.
schema.title: Namespace

parameters.description: Optional namespace guard; must match the saga row.

schema.description: Optional namespace guard; must match the saga row.

post.description: Approve a HITL-held step and enqueue HUMAN_APPROVED for the engine.

schema.title: Response Approve Step V1 Sagas  Trace Id  Steps  Step Span Id  Approve Post

post.description: Submit one idempotent human decision for a HITL-held step.

schema.title: Response Decide Step V1 Sagas  Trace Id  Steps  Step Span Id  Decision Post

post.description: Reject a HITL-held step and enqueue HUMAN_REJECTED for the engine.

schema.title: Response Reject Step V1 Sagas  Trace Id  Steps  Step Span Id  Reject Post

post.description: Re-run a HITL-held step; preserves upstream saga context (state-preserved retry).

schema.title: Response Retry Step V1 Sagas  Trace Id  Steps  Step Span Id  Retry Post

post.description: Retry a failed or stuck compensation step.

schema.title: Response Operator Retry Compensation V1 Sagas  Trace Id  Steps  Step Span Id  Retry Compensation Post

post.description: Retry a stuck forward step (IN_PROGRESS) after automatic recovery is exhausted.

schema.title: Response Operator Retry Step V1 Sagas  Trace Id  Steps  Step Span Id  Retry Step Post
